steps.title: Use the number's role
steps.content: The underlined phrase gives the scale of the Citizen Education Program: more than 7,000 attendees. Since the passage says CEP was crucial and trained activists who led local initiatives, the number emphasizes the program's reach.

steps.title: Separate scale from topics
steps.content: B shifts to workshop topics, but the underlined portion is a participant count. C invents attendees' political opinions. D invents criticism of the program. The number supports the passage's claim about broad impact. The answer is A.
